response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio in Scene 1 (00:00 - 01:38) phonetically matches the reference lyrics for 'Rivals and Equals' by Mori Calliope perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was fully utilized to structure and sync the performance in Scene 1. Scene 2 (03:25 - 05:00) did not have reference lyrics, so we transitioned to 100% manual transcription for the chat portion.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles for the music section are tightly wrapped around rapid-fire vocal bursts, with immediate transitions to prevent cascading delays. The long silent transition between 01:38 and 03:25 was left completely unsubtitled to avoid ghost subtitles. Chat subtitles in Scene 2 were carefully timed to Mori Calliope's natural speech pauses and vocal pacing.

subtitles.original: Thank you for coming today everyone, it's over!

subtitles.original: No, we're back, we're back.
subtitles.english: No, we're back, we're back.

subtitles.original: Just some technical difficulties.
subtitles.english: Just some technical difficulties.

subtitles.original: Staff-san's on the beats.
subtitles.english: Staff-san's on the beats.

subtitles.original: Everyone calm down, it's fine, it's fine. We're okay.

subtitles.original: Welcome, welcome!
subtitles.english: Welcome, welcome!

subtitles.original: Hey, you know what? It fits... It fits the theme of the show.
subtitles.english: Hey, you know what? It fits... It fits the theme of the show.

subtitles.original: That there would be some technical issues.
subtitles.english: That there would be some technical issues.

subtitles.original: So it can't be perfect, right? But I'm looking at your comments...
subtitles.english: So it can't be perfect, right? But I'm looking at your comments...

subtitles.original: And thank you, by the way, to Shiori for the raid as well.
subtitles.english: And thank you, by the way, to Shiori for the raid as well.

subtitles.original: Hope the outfit reveal went super good.
subtitles.english: Hope the outfit reveal went super good.

subtitles.original: Hi, Dead Beats!
subtitles.english: Hi, Dead Beats!

subtitles.original: Hello!
subtitles.english: Hello!

subtitles.original: We're here, we're here!
subtitles.english: We're here, we're here!

subtitles.original: We're finally at the Disasterpiece venue.
subtitles.english: We're finally at the Disasterpiece venue.

subtitles.original: And I'm reading your comments, but...
subtitles.english: And I'm reading your comments, but...

subtitles.original: ...there might be a little bit of lag, so sorry about that.
subtitles.english: ...there might be a little bit of lag, so sorry about that.

subtitles.original: Anyway, check it out. I've got a special...
subtitles.english: Anyway, check it out. I've got a special...

subtitles.original: ...I've got my own special mic that is definitely what I'm using to talk and not the headset.
subtitles.english: ...I've got my own special mic that is definitely what I'm using to talk and not the headset.

subtitles.original: But check it out!
subtitles.english: But check it out!

subtitles.original: Oh, I'll show it... I'll show it to you closer later.
subtitles.english: Oh, I'll show it... I'll show it to you closer later.

subtitles.original: I've got... Oh, hello! Liz is here too! Amazing senpai! Woo-hoo!
subtitles.english: I've got... Oh, hello! Liz is here too! Amazing senpai! Woo-hoo!

subtitles.original: Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: Welcome to Disaster Show, everyone.
subtitles.english: Welcome to Disaster Show, everyone.

subtitles.original: Disasterpiece is out at long last!
subtitles.english: Disasterpiece is out at long last!

subtitles.original: Hooray, we did it! We finally got here.
subtitles.english: Hooray, we did it! We finally got here.

subtitles.original: And now, I'm going to do some songs for you guys.
subtitles.english: And now, I'm going to do some songs for you guys.

subtitles.original: Wow, akasupa came... I can't read it right now, but I'll have to read them later. Thank you so much.
subtitles.english: Wow, akasupa came... I can't read it right now, but I'll have to read them later. Thank you so much.

subtitles.original: The new art style is so nice.
subtitles.english: The new art style is so nice.

subtitles.original: This is some Unreal Engine powered, Dead Beats. Unreal power.
subtitles.english: This is some Unreal Engine powered, Dead Beats. Unreal power.

subtitles.original: It's stunning, isn't it? I bet you want to get a closer look.
subtitles.english: It's stunning, isn't it? I bet you want to get a closer look.

subtitles.original: And maybe get some screenshots of Mori Calliope's face.
subtitles.english: And maybe get some screenshots of Mori Calliope's face.

subtitles.original: So let me show you. Staff-san is holding a special camera.
subtitles.english: So let me show you. Staff-san is holding a special camera.
